basic_details.job_title: Mizoram University Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Staff Nurse and Pharmacist Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram University Staff Nurse and Pharmacist Notification 2026 has been released on 02 July 2026 on the official website of Mizoram University. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Mizoram University Staff Nurse and Pharmacist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Nursing, GNM, ANM (Diploma), B.Pharm, D.Pharm
qualification.details: Staff Nurse: B.Sc. Nursing or GNM with more than 1 year experience OR GNM with less than 1 year experience OR ANM (Diploma) with more than 1 year experience. Pharmacist: B.Pharm OR D.Pharm.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Mizoram University Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.mizoram_university: B.Sc. Nursing, GNM, ANM (Diploma), B.Pharm, D.Pharm

content_sections.heading: Mizoram University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Mizoram University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Mizoram University Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Mizoram University Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Staff Nurse: B.Sc. Nursing or GNM with more than 1 year experience OR GNM with less than 1 year experience OR ANM (Diploma) with more than 1 year experience. Pharmacist: B.Pharm OR D.Pharm.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Mizoram University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Mizoram University recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Staff Nurse and Pharmacist posts at Mizoram University is scheduled for 17th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Staff Nurse and Pharmacist posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by Mizoram University for the Staff Nurse and Pharmacist positions. This includes 2 for Staff Nurse and 1 for Pharmacist.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: For the Staff Nurse position, candidates need to possess a B.Sc. Nursing or GNM with more than 1 year of experience. Alternatively, GNM with less than 1 year of experience or ANM (Diploma) with more than 1 year of experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Pharmacist post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Pharmacist role, candidates must have completed a B.Pharm or D.Pharm degree. These are the minimum educational requirements for this position.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the Staff Nurse and Pharmacist posts at Mizoram University. Both General/OBC and SC/ST candidates are exempt.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for these positions?
faq.answer: The application process for these government jobs is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are required to attend the interview in person with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Mizoram University office. The specific address is Aizawl, Mizoram, with the pincode 796004.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates. Self-attested photocopies of these documents are also required.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Staff Nurse and Pharmacist at Mizoram University are contractual in nature. This means the employment will be for a fixed period as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the Mizoram University Staff Nurse and Pharmacist recruitment can be found on the official website of Mizoram University. A direct link to the notification is also provided in the Important Links section of this article.
